title: Sprinter
description: Adds a simple keybind to toggle auto-sprint
body:
# Sprinter Mod

This mod adds a simple keybind to toggle auto-sprint in Minecraft. With this mod, players can automatically sprint without holding the sprint key, and toggle it on or off with a customizable keybind.

## Features

- **Toggle Auto Sprint**: Automatically sprint without holding down the sprint key.
  
- **Customizable Keybind**: Set your own keybind to toggle auto-sprint on/off.
  
- **Lightweight**: Minimal impact on performance.
  
- Fully **Client Side**.

## How to Use

1. Install the mod.
   
2. Configure the keybind through the Minecraft controls menu.
   
3. Press the assigned key to toggle auto-sprint.


Enjoy seamless movement with this simple utility!
